app.name: FMS Mobile
app.shortDescription: Secure fleet, lending, and credit workflow operations in one mobile workspace.
app.fullDescription: FMS Mobile helps authorized teams manage fleet operations, borrower records, loan workflows, supporting documents, and audit-ready credit processes from a single secure mobile workspace. Current features include role-based access, secure authentication, loan origination support, document handling, meeting-audio transcription workflows, and operational dashboards for credit, compliance, and workflow visibility.

reviewFocus: Loan application and borrower record handling
Audio transcription and meeting-minutes workflows for authorized users
requiredAssets: Feature graphic if required by marketing

appReview.notes: Provide App Review with a working demo account, plus notes covering login, account deletion, AI meeting workflows, document parsing, and any role-restricted features.
